name: preview_scroll
description: Scroll the tab selected by tabId, or this agent session's current tab when omitted. Positive deltaY scrolls down and positive deltaX scrolls right; a locator/selector targets a container.

tabId.description: Exact collaborative browser tab to target. Omit to use this agent session's current tab.

allOf.description: Horizontal scroll delta in CSS pixels. Positive scrolls right. Defaults to 0.
Vertical scroll delta in CSS pixels. Positive scrolls down. Defaults to 0.

selector.description: Legacy CSS selector for a scrollable container. Omit to scroll the viewport.

locator.description: Playwright selector for a scrollable container. Omit to scroll the viewport.
